sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id Int32, wkt_string String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT readWKTRing(wkt_string) AS ring FROM geo_test WHERE value < 5.0;
SELECT id, readWKTRing(wkt_string) AS ring FROM geo_test WHERE value / 2 < toFloat64(NULLIF(value, 0));
SELECT id, readWKTRing(wkt_string) AS ring FROM geo_test WHERE (value < 5.0) AND (ring IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, readWKTRing(wkt_string) AS ring FROM (SELECT wkt_string, value FROM geo_test WHERE value < 10) WHERE ring < readWKTRing('POLYGON ((0 0, 1 1, 2 2, 0 0))');
SELECT count(*) FROM geo_test GROUP BY readWKTRing(wkt_string) HAVING count(*) > 1;
SELECT id, readWKTRing(wkt_string) AS ring FROM geo_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM geo_test WHERE value < 5) ORDER BY value DESC;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE geo_temp AS SELECT id, readWKTRing(wkt_string) AS ring FROM geo_test WHERE value < 10;
SELECT id, readWKTRing(NULLIF(wkt_string, '')) AS ring FROM geo_test WHERE value < 10.0 AND ring IS NOT NULL;
